name: add_deploy_readiness_notes
description: Append a lightweight deploy readiness checklist to README for repeatable release prep.

args.content:
## Deploy Readiness Checklist

- Run verification: `{{checkCommand}}`
- Confirm `.env` values are set for runtime
- Verify `/healthz` responds locally
- Trigger deployment after explicit approval
- Smoke test production route after deploy command: `{{deployCommand}}`
